revisions.what_changed: Workshopped 31 Danilo tabs (640-670) covering hiring strategy, processes, job specs, compensation, and firing/offboarding. Green-field build (Bootstrap File 16 archived, not used). Consolidated into 5 comprehensive content files: hiring strategy (team evolution, PM competence framework, operator vs employee), hiring processes (sourcing, interviews, onboarding, firing), job specifications (11 roles from operator to CEO/CFO/VP phase-gated by MRR), compensation framework (equity vs cash, market data, dilution waterfall), industry perspectives (2026 D2C hiring landscape, remote trends). Expert dialogue (6 rounds, 6 upgrades: PM competence conversational embedding, pipeline-building 4-6 weeks early, dilution waterfall math, firing timing humane protocols, community engagement sourcing, hybrid creative sprint model). Self-grade: 8.0/10 (A evidence on Danilo frameworks, C/D on IonWave timing pre-launch). OpKit created: OK-M31-001 D2C Hiring Framework (14-step universal process with scaffolds).
revisions.quality_rationale: A-grade Danilo frameworks (PM competence 59-row scorecard, job specs, interview protocols, firing guide) + A-grade 2026 market research (Upwork, FlexJobs, Ravio verified sources) + B-grade dialogue upgrades (dilution waterfall, hybrid model, community sourcing) + C/D-grade IonWave timing (pre-revenue assumptions, Month 1-6 projections). Conservative grading: explicit D-grade flagging with upgrade paths. Not 9.0+ because no real hiring data (can't validate timeline/equity/competence assumptions without actual hires). Path to 9.0+: Execute Month 3-4 Creative PM hire, validate process timing, survey operator equity expectations.

sheets.name: Labor Strategy
sheets.note: Hire PMs who think, not VAs

sheets.name: PM Competence Framework
sheets.note: 59 rows - 18-question scorecard, 'Don't spend $1 on ads until score >60'

files.description: When to hire, team evolution (solo → operator → PMs), PM Competence Framework (18-question scorecard >60 before ad spend), operator vs employee distinction, 3-4 PM maximum constraint
files.note: Consolidates tabs 640-643, 669. Novel: PM Competence Framework prevents $5-10K waste, 3-4 PM anti-scaling constraint.

files.description: Complete hiring workflow: sourcing (community engagement, pipeline-building 4-6 weeks early), interviews (screening/focused/reference), candidate evaluation, onboarding (8-11 hrs Day 1), firing/offboarding (humane protocols)
files.note: Consolidates tabs 646-657. Dialogue upgrades: avoid Friday firings, community engagement playbook, pipeline-building timeline.

files.description: 11 role specs (Operator, Creative PM, Ops PM, Growth PM, Head of Ops, CM, CFO, CEO, Venture Partner) phase-gated by MRR ($0 / $15-25K / $30-50K / $75-150K+ triggers). Responsibilities, requirements, scorecards.
files.note: Consolidates tabs 644, 658-666, 668. CEO/CFO/VP marked Phase 3+ (post-PMF). Operator + 3 PMs are Phase 1-2 focus.

files.description: Equity vs cash trade-offs, operator equity model (10-25% with dilution waterfall), market data sources (Levels.fyi, Pave, Carta), negotiation framework, 4-year vesting standard
files.note: Consolidates tabs 645, 667. Dialogue upgrade: dilution waterfall example shows founder+operator+SAFE stacking math.

files.description: 2026 D2C hiring landscape (4.5% unemployment, 85% remote preference, contractor marketplaces), remote vs in-person trade-offs, hybrid creative sprint model, sourcing channels (Upwork/Contra/Twitter/communities)
files.note: 7 2026 web sources (Upwork, FlexJobs, Ravio, Trends.vc, AngelList). Dialogue upgrade: hybrid sprint model (3-5 days every 6-8 weeks).

files.description: 6-round expert persona dialogue (HR Professional, Startup Recruiter, D2C Founder) to saturation, 6 upgrades applied (PM competence embedding, pipeline-building, dilution waterfall, firing timing, community sourcing, hybrid model)
files.note: 100% upgrade efficiency (6 rounds, 6 upgrades, saturation achieved). All upgrades actionable.

files.description: 5-dimension self-grade rubric (Evidence 8.5/10, Honesty 9.0/10, Upgrade Paths 8.0/10, Actionability 8.0/10, Reusability 7.5/10) with upgrade shopping list to 9.0/10
files.note: Overall 8.0/10. Path to 9.0+: real hiring data Month 3-4, operator equity precedent from Nilo, time actual onboarding.

files.description: Complete workshop summary: input (31 tabs), process (11 phases), output (8 files), key innovations (PM Competence, operator equity, 3-4 PM constraint, pipeline-building, hybrid model, community sourcing), evidence quality breakdown
files.note: Comprehensive workshop documentation with explicit intelligence gaps and upgrade paths.

feeds_into: All operational TUPs requiring human labor (M1 Labor Chain, M9 Ecommerce, M12 Creative, M13 Media Buying, M17-M22 Retention, M24 Fulfillment, M30 Analytics, M35 Execution)
requires: M0 Trade Thesis — strategic direction, revenue targets
M3 Financial Model — cash runway, MRR triggers for hiring
M2 Entity & Legal — cap table structure, equity pool
key_blockers: NONE. All critical path items have precedent or fallback. Pre-launch status means IonWave hiring timing is C/D-grade (validated Month 1-6). Operator equity negotiation requires Studio 4 precedent (ask Nilo).
next_action: Month 1-2: Post operator role (Upwork + Twitter + referrals), build pipeline 4-6 weeks before Month 3-4 hire. Operator Day 1 onboarding (8-11 hrs), execute PM Competence scorecard (score >60 before ad spend). Month 3-4: Hire Creative PM if $15-25K MRR + creative bottleneck. Maintain 3-4 PM maximum constraint.

intelligence_gaps.upgrade: B: Ask Nilo for 2-3 anonymized examples. A: Document negotiation ranges, formalize Studio valuation methodology.

intelligence_gaps.gap: First hire timing for IonWave ($15K? $25K? Burnout trigger?)
intelligence_gaps.upgrade: B: Track founder hrs/week Month 1-3, if >60 hrs sustained + revenue >$15K MRR, start recruiting.
B: Test with Month 3-4 Creative PM hire. A: Refine questions based on actual operator performance correlation.

intelligence_gaps.gap: Contractor marketplace quality (Upwork vs Contra vs Freelancer)
intelligence_gaps.upgrade: B: Test all 3 platforms Month 1-2, document quality/cost/speed. A: Build preferred vendor list.
A: Time actual onboarding Month 3-4, validate or adjust estimate.

intelligence_gaps.gap: Firing protocol effectiveness (avoid Friday + holiday timing)
intelligence_gaps.upgrade: A: If firing occurs, document humane process adherence, legal clearance, network access timing.

intelligence_gaps.gap: Hybrid creative sprint ROI ($2-6K/year travel cost)
intelligence_gaps.upgrade: B: Execute 1-2 sprints, measure creative output quality vs remote-only baseline. A: Formalize sprint cadence + budget allocation.
B: Track Trends.vc/Discord engagement → hire conversion. A: Document playbook refinements.
